category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and heat pump air conditioners exported from China to Thailand.

title.en: China-to-Thailand Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Thailand's TISI mandatory certification, EGAT mandatory energy labelling, EPPO efficiency policies, EPPO/MEA/PEA energy-efficiency environment, NRCT radio homologation, and TIS / IEC 60335-2-40 safety framework.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与泰国TISI强制认证、EGAT强制能效标签、EPPO能效政策、EPPO/MEA/PEA能效体系、NRCT无线入网批准及TIS／IEC 60335-2-40安全框架的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與泰國TISI強制認證、EGAT強制能效標籤、EPPO能效政策、EPPO/MEA/PEA能效體系、NRCT無線入網批准及TIS／IEC 60335-2-40安全框架之差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, customs tariff decision, market-access permit, or importer registration replacement. Exporters, importers, customs brokers, distributors, and installers should verify current TISI scope, EGAT label and star-rating obligations, EPPO energy policy parameters, refrigerant phase-down duties, NRCT radio homologation scope, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、海关税务决定、市场准入许可或进口方资质注册的替代。出口商、进口商、报关代理、经销商和安装方应在出货、销售或投入使用前与合格专业人士核验现行TISI适用范围、EGAT标签及五星彩级义务、EPPO能效政策参数、制冷剂淘汰义务、NRCT无线准入范围和安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、海關稅務決定、 市場准入許可或進口方資質註冊替代。出口商、進口商、報關代理、經銷商和安裝方應在出貨、銷售或投入使用前與合格專業人士核驗現行TISI適用範圍、EGAT標籤及五星彩級義務、EPPO能效政策參數、制冷劑淘汰義務、NRCT無線認可範圍和安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For Chinese air-source heat pumps to Thailand, the major gaps are TISI product certification (with TIS / IEC 60335-2-40 safety basis), mandatory EGAT/MEA P7/5-star energy disclosure, EPPO energy-efficiency policy alignment for EER/COP thresholds, NRCT homologation for wireless-enabled units, and non-recognition of China CCC documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入泰国的主要差距是TISI产品认证（基于TIS／IEC 60335-2-40安全要求）、EGAT/MEA五星彩级和能效标签、EPPO能效政策下的EER/COP门槛、无线功能机型需NRCT入网批准，以及中国CCC资料不被泰国接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入泰國的主要差距是TISI產品認證（基於TIS／IEC 60335-2-40安全要求）、EGAT／MEA五星彩級和能效標籤、EPPO能效政策下的EER/COP門檻、無線功能機型需NRCT入網批准，以及中國CCC資料不被泰國接受。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon TISI, EGAT, EPPO, and NRCT regulatory updates
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
